goal: Stop repeated malformed diff retry loops and retry transient git push failures.
assumptions: malformed_diff is a structural model-output failure, not ordinary context drift.
Full-file fallback is the reliable recovery path for malformed diffs.
Empty reply from server during git push is transient and safe to retry.
risks: Direct fallback writes more content than a diff, so protected-file and allowed-prefix gates must remain.
Push retry must not hide non-transient failures such as rejected refs.
steps: Add red e2e coverage requiring malformed diffs to skip retry-patch generation.
Route malformed_diff directly to full-file fallback.
Add hunk body count validation to diff preflight.
Add transient git push classification and retry push up to three attempts.
Run focused and full codex-cli verification.
